EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Malware "{object.name}" of type "{object.type}" was detected in object {object.storage.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
A threat sample was submitted to Symantec from host {event_src.host}
Infected object {object.storage.fullpath} was quarantined on host {event_src.host}
Infected object {object.storage.fullpath} was cured on host {event_src.host}
Proactive detection is now permitted on host {event_src.host}
